Monogram Padded Windbreaker

COMMENTS:
Your satisfaction is our #1 priority. We strive to be as accurate as possible in the description of an item's condition. Sometimes there may be slight color variations due to photo enlargement or individual monitor settings. Occasionally, we discover that an item is damaged and we cannot ship it. Please check the conditions and photos carefully before purchasing; if you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, please contact us before leaving negative feedback.

ABOUT US:
We specialize in selling authentic pre-owned designer brands.

name: On My Side leather tote
description:
LV On My Side PM
 
✨Condition: Excellent. Sticker intact hardware. Only flaw is minor creases throughout the bag and crease on strap
✨100% authentic
✨Comes with dust bag and bag organizer
✨Retails $4400 before tax 
✨Feel free to use my photos to authenticate 
✨Please don’t hesitate to ask questions

❗️FINAL SALE❗️NO returns❗️Please review all photos carefully and ask questions before purchase❗️

The On My Side PM is a compact tote bag made from soft calf leather with side panels in classic Monogram canvas. This adorable everyday bag boasts a wide removable strap for on-trend shoulder and cross-body wear as well as two top handles for hand and elbow carry. Two large outside pockets give easy access to essentials.
9.8 x 7.9 x 4.7 inches 
(Length x Height x Width)
* Black
* Monogram coated canvas and calf leather
* Cowhide-leather trim
* Microfiber lining
* Gold-color hardware
* Closure system with a hook 
* 2 outside pockets
* Zipped pocket
* Flat pocket
* 4 protective metal bottom studs
* Fits: smartphone, Zippy long wallet, earphones, lipstick, keys
* Strap:Removable, not adjustable
* Strap drop:20.1 inches
* Handle:Double

name: Noé leather handbag
description:
Structured Louis Vuitton bucket bag in black Epi leather.  Date code VI10922, made in France,  September 1992.  

This bag is in excellent condition.  No storage smells or stains.  Minor scuff marks on corners and one at the top of the bag.  Marks are cosmetic and no exposed piping.  Drawstring has some wear and strap has some wrinkles but no cracking.  

Closure: Secured by a leather drawstring, threaded through polished gold-tone/brass metal eyelets.  Some wear on the drawstring, but in good shape. 

Strap: Features a wide, adjustable leather shoulder strap with buckle hardware, designed for comfortable shoulder carry.  Approximately 10-14 inch drop. 

Interior: finished with a soft microfiber/alcantara lining in a coordinating dark shade, offering one large open compartment. And zipper side pocket. 

Size (GM): The "GM" (Grand Modèle) is the largest size in the Noé family.

name: Juliette cloth crossbody bag
description:
Louis Vuitton Mini Lin Monogram Juliette bag

Vintage Louis Vuitton Mini Lin Monogram Juliette crossbody bag. 2002 Marc Jacobs Era Louis Vuitton piece. Great small bag for everyday or running errands. Will fit all the essentials wallet, keys, phone, sunglasses. One large main compartment with a zippered closure with an internal slip pocket. One external slim pocket with a buckle closure. Adjustable strap for crossbody or shoulder wear. No major damage to outside cloth canvas. Interior lining is clean. 
Measures approximately 8.5”w 4.75”h 1.75”d. These are hand taken measurements. 

Please note the bag is crunchy from the paper/glue between the exterior and interior. This is a common issue with this bag and its biggest flaw. It does not take away from the functionality of the bag. 

Please feel free to ask any questions.

name: Shorts
description:
A standout archival-inspired piece from Virgil Abloh’s Spring/Summer era, these basketball shorts embody his signature blend of streetwear and luxury sports design. Featuring a bold Miami Dolphins–inspired colorway, they reflect the experimental aesthetic that made Virgil’s work so influential in modern fashion.

This pair is a highly sought-after seasonal release, with very limited availability and strong collector demand due to the short production window typical of Abloh’s seasonal drops. Pieces from this era rarely circulate in the resale market, especially in clean, wearable condition.

* Size: Small
* Condition: Used but very clean, well cared for
* Lightweight mesh construction with premium detailing
* Authentic Virgil Abloh-era design language throughout
*Freshly dry cleaned professionally no odors

Dimensions:
*Waist: 12”
*Inseam: 7”
*Leg Opening 10.5”
*Front Rise 11”
*Thigh: 11”
*Knee 11”

A true statement piece that captures the essence of early SS22 Virgil sportswear—perfect for collectors or anyone looking for a rare grail-level summer short.

name: Geronimo cloth crossbody bag
description:
Louis Vuitton Damier Ebene Geronimos Sling Bag (SHF-u544qp)

Fresh and artistic, Louis Vuitton remains one of the world's most coveted symbols of status and sophistication. The Damier pattern was designed in 1888 and the Monogram, in 1896. Over a hundred years later, these remain two of the most recognizable prints in the world. Nicolas Ghesquière, previously of Balenciaga, is the artistic director of women’s collections (2013). Virgil Abloh was the artistic director of the men’s line starting in March 2018 until his untimely passing in 2021.

Condition Notes: Minor tear to corner of exterior top pocket. Light scuffs and wear throughout exterior. Light surface scratches to hardware. Minor marks to interior. 

Width (at base): 4.5"
Height: 7.5"
Depth: 2"
Shoulder Strap Drop: 14", Adjustable
Circa: 2014
Type of Material: Coated Canvas, Leather, Nylon
Color: Brown
Lining: Brown Fine Textile
Pockets: Two Exterior
Hardware: Gold Tone
Closure: Zipper
Origin: Spain
Includes: Dust Bag

name: Cashmere cardigan
description:
Introducing a cardigan that refuses to play it safe. This Louis Vuitton piece features a stunning salmon pink front that catches the light beautifully, paired with a shimmering metallic pointelle knit back that adds unexpected glamour. The contrasting red trim along the bottom creates a bold finishing touch that ties the whole look together. Crafted from a luxurious cashmere blend, it's soft enough for all-day comfort while maintaining its sophisticated structure. The button-down front and short sleeves make it endlessly versatile; layer it over a slip dress for evening elegance or throw it on with your favorite tee for weekend flair. This is the cardigan for those who believe fashion should be fun, fearless, and unapologetically fabulous. Perfect for anyone ready to make a statement without saying a word.
  • Size L
  • Made in Italy
  • 45% Polyamide, 20% Cashmere, 35% Polyester
  • Button down front

name: Shearling jacket
description:
This is a LOUIS VUITTON black REVERSIBLE SHEARLING & NYLON Windbreaker Jacket in size 38. 100% authentic Louis Vuitton reversible windbreaker in black with one side in smooth nylon and the other in plush shearling. Features a boxy, cropped silhouette with a sleek mock neck and 3/4 raglan sleeves (sleeve measurement taken from the neck). Both sides include angled pockets, balancing utility with minimalist design. Closes with a central zipper on the front, allowing the piece to shift effortlessly between technical lightness and rich, tactile warmth.
